description: Represents a particular component of the application.

egress.description: The egress configuration of the component.
egress.title: egress

ingress.description: The ingress configuration of the component. Configure the ingress settings if this app component is a server and has its request processing configured through the provider settings.
ingress.title: ingress

provider.description: The optional provider configuration of the component. If this app component is a server and is itself acting as a provider, define the provider settings here. Policies for incoming requests to this provider are controlled through the ingress setinngs.
provider.title: provider

renewToken.description: Set to true on update to issue a new credential.
renewToken.title: renewToken

renewTokenTag.description: Set to value on update to associate a tag with the issued token.
renewTokenTag.title: renewTokenTag

selector.description: The selector configuration that identifies workload groups as this app component.
selector.title: selector

token.description: The token for the current component. Only populated by the backend when the caller's claim match the parents app.subject.
token.title: token

tokenref.description: The list of tokens issued for this component.
tokenref.title: tokenref

title: AppComponent
